title: Disney Pixar Incredibles 2 Personalized Pencils Hero Super Star Awesome 6 Pack
description:
Everyone's favorite family of superheroes is back in, Incredibles 2, but this time Helen is the one in the spotlight, leaving Bob at home with Violet, Dash, and Jack-Jack to navigate the day-to-day heroics of normal life. You can bring your heroes to school with you by using these pencils. Each Color has a different character and saying attached to it: Blue: Edna Mode - Awesome - Mr. Incredible Yellow: Violet - Super Star - Elastigirl Dark Green: Dash - Hero - Frozone Please Note: All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed, 100% authentic for worldwide distribution
